description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a predominantly black canvas upper, featuring white stitching and a white rubber toe cap. The shoe has white laces threaded through metal eyelets in a standard criss-cross pattern. On the outer side, there is a colorful graphic of a character with teal hair and animal ears, while the inner side displays a circular emblem with a stylized bird. The tongue and heel areas are reinforced, and the midsole is white with a black stripe running along its length. The outsole appears to be made of textured rubber for grip, and the shoe is in pristine, unworn condition. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, suitable for urban environments.
description: A black high-top sneaker with white laces, a character graphic on the outer side, and a circular emblem on the inner side. The shoe features a white toe cap and midsole, with a clean, new appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white toe cap, white laces, and the top of the tongue with a small emblem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the teal-haired character graphic and the full length of the laces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel seam, partial character graphic, and a small circular logo on the heel tab.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the circular bird emblem and the clean black canvas upper.
attribute_logo: Circular bird emblem on inner side, small emblem on tongue, circular logo on heel tab; all white on black background.
